object_a.label: table
object_a.description: small wooden side table with items
object_a.long_form_open_description: Dark wood end table with a few small objects and possibly a cloth or placemat; placed immediately to the right of the recliner at arm height. Surface holds indistinct items like a small dish and folded textiles.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: To the right of the recliner and directly in front of the window

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: small wooden end table next to right-side sofa
object_b.long_form_open_description: Dark wood end table with a glass or decorative top surface situated between the right-side sofa and the camera; holds a table lamp, decorative items and possibly a small plant.
